templates.name: Can I leave a gift note on the order?
templates.content: We currently don't have a gifting option available, though I'll definitely pass this along to the team to consider in the future.

templates.name: Customer Support
templates.content: The best way to handle this is to email us directly at help@bellzi.com or give us a call at (888)-317-1502. Our team is happy to help!

templates.name: Shipping Time
templates.content: Our processing time takes 2-5 business days and we usually ship via USPS, UPS, FedEx, or DHL. Once shipped, it will take 5-7 business days for domestic orders and 7-16 business days for international orders.

templates.name: Social Media
templates.content: Give us a follow on IG: https://www.instagram.com/bellzi_official/ and FB here: https://www.facebook.com/Bellzi/

templates.name: Phone Support
templates.content: You can give us a call at (888)-317-1502 or let me know if I can help via text, it may be faster.

templates.name: Can I ship an order to more than one address?
templates.content: We can only assign one shipping address per order.

templates.name: Can I put Bellzi items in the washing machine? / Care Instructions
templates.content: We suggest you spot wash and air dry all of your Bellzi Friends.

templates.name: Return Policy
templates.content: You can check out our detailed return policy at the following link - https://bellzi.com/pages/info and you can start your return here: https://bellzi.returnlogic.com/

templates.name: Free Shipping
templates.content: We offer free shipping on domestic orders over $50. Maybe you can add something else to reach the minimum?

templates.name: Cancel / edit order
templates.content: I can check if that's possible. What's the order number, email address and the change you'd like to make?

templates.name: Store location / retailer
templates.content: We don't currently have a store but definitely keep an eye out.

templates.name: Wholesale inquiries
templates.content: Thank you for your interest! The best way to discuss wholesale is to email us directly at help@bellzi.com. Our team is happy to chat.

templates.name: Brand ambassador / sponsorship
templates.content: Thank you for your interest! The best way to discuss this is to email us directly at help@bellzi.com. Our team is happy to chat.

templates.name: Military / First responder / Healthcare / Teacher discount
templates.content: Thank you for your service! We don't have any specific discounts like that, but our deals will always be shared with our SMS subscribers or on our website, so keep an eye out!

templates.name: Restock? (autosend enabled)
templates.content: I currently don't have the exact date of a possible restock, but I recommend signing up on the product page so you're notified the second it comes back in!

templates.name: Code won't work
templates.content: Please note that codes are valid on full-priced items. They cannot be applied to limited edition plushies, special plushies, seasonal plushies, or items that are already discounted. If the item you are trying to purchase falls into one of these categories, that could be the reason why the code is not working.
